privileged_info_summary: The task modifies a CRM opportunity record named 'Office Furniture - Deco Addict' in a local Odoo instance. Initial values are $25,000 revenue, 20% probability, 0 priority stars, and no tags. Target values are $75,000 revenue, 60% probability, 2 priority stars, and Enterprise tag. All metadata values are consistent with the task description and verification logic. Data is entirely synthetic, generated by the setup script.
